zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley是Girolamo Pettenati和Mrs Girolamo Pettenati的女兒，於1467年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓。她於大約1488年與Richard Wall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1531年在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley是Girolamo Pettenati和Mrs Girolamo Pettenati的女儿，于1467年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓。她于大约1488年与Richard Wall在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1531年在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯特普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Whalley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Whaley  .

variants.name: Whaley
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Whalley (Lancashire) or Whaley in Bolsover (Derbyshire). The Lancashire placename may derive from Old English hwæl ‘hill’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Derbyshire placename may derive from Old English wall ‘wall’, walh ‘Welshman, foreigner’ (genitive plural wala), or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley was born in 1467, in Preston, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Girolamo Pettenati and Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. She married Richard Wall about 1488, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1531, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley est née en 1467, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Girolamo Pettenati et Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. Elle a épousé Richard Wall environ 1488, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1531, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley wurde 1467 in Preston, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Girolamo Pettenati und Mrs Girolamo Pettenati geboren. Sie hat um 1488 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Richard Wall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1531 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Stepney, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley è nata il nel 1467 nel Preston, Lancashire, England come figlia di Girolamo Pettenati e Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. Lei sposato Richard Wall circa 1488, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1531, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Stepney, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalleyは1467年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでGirolamo PettenatiとMrs Girolamo Pettenatiの娘として生まれた。約1488年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでRichard Wallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1531年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley(은)는 1467년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Girolamo Pettenati(와)과 Mrs Girolamo Pettenati의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Richard Wall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley nasceu em 1467, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de Girolamo Pettenati e Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. Ela casou-se com Richard Wall aproximadamente 1488, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1531, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley родилась в 1467 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия. Её родителей звали Girolamo Pettenati и Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Wall около 1488 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1531 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Whalley nació en 1467, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hija de Girolamo Pettenati y Mrs Girolamo Pettenati. Se casó con Richard Wall aproximadamente 1488, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1531, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
